meta.author: John Doe

pages.title: About this blog
pages.text: Hey friend!This blog is created to pin the updates of my study/work in journalism, reading, photographing, meeting with people etc. To clarify the name of this page, STEP-HOP is a dance step consisting of a forward step followed by a hop on the same foot. In Quickstep of ballroom dancing, this step is used to turn around and move towards a new direction. This word gives a sense of stepping to the next stage of path, and this is exactly my expectation for career, life and the world.Let’s step hop! Continue reading to know about meeeee! Studying journalism & communication in PKU then THU …More info: Writing Excited with data but still a beginner …Leyi’s feeds herself with creative stories and visual designs from branding advertising cases to data essays. Crafting stories with a combination of media forms and cutting-edge technology is her emphasis for graduate school learning. Puzzle games & ballroom dancing in leisure …Leyi watches drama series in her leisure time. Sherlock Holmes and Fleabag are her favorite. This year she has been hooked on real-time role-playing games and conducted a little study based on observations and experiences. Besides these she spent most of her time in ballroom dancing, which “invigorates the body and liberates the brain from unlimited thinking,” as she said.

posts.title: 数据科学从零到一
posts.text: 统计/数学/杂乱无章 Statistics/Theories极大似然估计： 对于这个函数：输入有两个：x表示某一个具体的数据；alpha表示模型的参数 如果alpha是已知确定的,x是变量，这个函数叫做概率函数(probability function)，它描述对于不同的样本点 ，其出现概率是多少。如果x是已知确定的，alpha是变量，这个函数叫做似然函数(likelihood function), 它描述对于不同的模型参数，出现 这个样本点的概率是多少。 R解读logistic回归保持其他变量不变时，β1的值表示X1值每增加一个单位时Y的变化量；而在逻辑回归模型中，结合之前所提到的发生比，X1每增加一个单位，对数发生比（log odds）的变化为β1。 R语言教程
posts.author: collected by Leyi Sun

posts.text: Bloomberg automation 彭博公司信息构成Overview: what does the company sell?Operations: the sales split by businesses, products split and revenues sourceGeographic Reach: headquarter, offices and customers location; production and selling locationSales & marketing: market splitFinancial performanceStrategyBackground and history BICS 行业分类，行业内的排名以及涉及行业的split SPLC 供应链数据缺失怎么办？ 零售和批发vs消费品门类的差别？
posts.author: Leyi Sun

posts.title: R-learning notebook
posts.text: 描述多维数据，探索相关性123attach(evdata)par(mex=0.5)pairs(evdata,gap=0,cex.labels=0.8) 对于数值型变量采用 1cor(abc) 多元线性回归有限采用最小二乘估计： maxLike包的maxLike函数最大似然估计 模型检验与评价：显著性检验t值：不是每个都显著，是否剔除变量F值：联合检验是否显著，是否更该模型anova函数得到方差表：从上向下进行，逐个剔除模型 R语言对大规模数据进行描述性分析与绘图探索流程.batch2为原数据.sample1为小样本 Step1：读取数据到数据集batch2 <- read.csv(“/home/mw/input/data5003/batch2_jobID_00B80TR.csv”) 原数据集中取前十行作为小样本，试运行debug语法观察小样本，确定数据集包含变量的类型与统计口径sample1 <- batch2[c(1:10),]sample1 对原数据集各变量的分布进行观察。输出每个变量的四分位数。summary(batch2) 根据summary的四分位数情况，对工作年限和距离城市的公里数两个定距变量进行简单分组。分组后可以采用定类X定距的箱型图观察各组的分布情况由于变量数较少采用batch2[第几列]引用条件[]方括号内写筛选条件，赋值需要用双引号括起标签batch2$experience_cate[batch2[7]<= 6] <- “short”batch2$experience_cate[batch2[7]> 6 & batch2[6]<=12 ] <- “mid”batch2$experience_cate[batch2[7]> 12 & batch2[6]<=18 ] <- “long”batch2$experience_cate[batch2[7]> 18] <- “supreme” batch2$distance_cate[batch2[6]<= 25] <- “Close”batch2$distance_cate[batch2[6]> 25 & batch2[6]<=50 ] <- “Mid”batch2$distance_cate[batch2[6]> 50 & batch2[6]<=75 ] <- “Far”batch2$distance_cate[batch2[6]> 75] <- “Very far” 使用R内置的boxplot函数绘制箱型图。y变量x变量，即工资工作年限组别。内置函数无法调整x变量各水平的顺序boxplot(salary ~ experience_cate, data = batch2, xlab = “工作年限”, ylab = “工资”)

posts.title: Greeting Thao from Tsinghua GBJ
posts.excerpt: 5 questions to know about Thao Nguyen, a new student of Tsinghua Global Business Journalism program from Vietnam.
posts.text: 5 questions to know about Thao Nguyen, a new student of Tsinghua Global Business Journalism program from Vietnam. Carrer in HochiminhQ1: Before you come to Tsinghua GBJ program, where were you? Thao: I worked for CHANNEL as a marketing manager the year before. Before that I worked for Unilever and then moved to the luxury brand. I was based in Hochiminh city in Vietnam, while I completed my undergraduate school in London, UK. Why Tsinghua GBJQ2: How did you made the decision to come to Tsinghua? Thao: I learned about the syllabus, courses, and culture, and found the university is well-suited for my goal. There is a psychological center that I would like to explore more. The humanity of this university and the activeness of Tsinghua students on social media attracted me.Then I found GBJ program. There are courses focusing on mass media communication in modern China. For me, China is a nation with a diversified culture which definitely worth exploring. Refresh to re-startQ3: What does going back to campus means to you, given that you've had years of working experiences? Thao: My attempt to come to Tsinghua is to refresh my career life. I’m not scoring high. Before looking at programs in Tsinghua, I was in the application process for MBA of Singapore, when I did a self-reflection and questioned whether MBA was what I wanted. My new plan for career is to work for my own start-up, which would be a coffee chain store. My grandparents own a coffee farm in Vietnam, and I myself have rich experiences and knowledge in producing and recognizing coffee. In my plan, profits will be donated to charities that help with health problems in the young generation. Journalism? Not a mustQ4: What do you think about journalism? Thao: I was thinking of choosing a master’s program in communication, but I never thought about taking journalism as a career. Instead, I leverage journalism as means to support my campaign in the future. This will better my skill in writing, and help me maintain partnership for my brand. Interest driven by Covid…Q5: Why you concerns about mental health so much? Thao: I have friends doing business in hotels and restaurants who faced great pressure under Covid. Though they’re restarting the business now, there was a very hard time for them, when they even got into depression. I think mental health is not only the top priority but also a fashion. Thao is coming back to Tsinghua in the comming week. Also professors teaching in the GBJ program are planning to return to Beijing after two years of working remotely.
posts.author: Leyi Sun

posts.title: Welcome to Helen's journal!
posts.excerpt: Hey friend! This blog is created to pin the updates of my study/work in journalism, reading, photographing, meeting with people etc.
posts.text: Hey friend! This blog is created to pin the updates of my study/work in journalism, reading, photographing, meeting with people etc. To clarify the name of this page, STEP-HOP is a dance step consisting of a forward step followed by a hop on the same foot. In Quickstep of ballroom dancing, this step is used to turn around and move towards a new direction. This word gives a sense of stepping to the next stage of path, and this is exactly my expectation for career, life and the world. Let’s step hop! Continue reading to know about meeeee! Study journalism & communication in PKU then THUI’m studying for my double-degree master’s program of Journalism and Data Science at Tsinghua University. I graduated from Peking University with a bachelor’s degree in advertising in 2022, where I joined PKU Youth, a school media community, and worked as the chief editor for a year. At PKU Youth I interviewed people, operated the WeChat account, conducted investigations and wrote features. Experiences as a student journalist was so amazing! I felt invigorated when listening to stories, taking them down and waiting for the story to get released. It’s also motivating to think of using media literacy to inlfuence people’s perception and behavior and change a little bit of the world. Excited with data but still a beginnerDuring the past summer holiday of 2022, I found great pleasure in exploring information visualization designs from branding advertising cases to data essays. Crafting stories with a combination of media forms and cutting-edge technology becomes my emphasis for graduate school learning. Puzzle games & ballroom dancing in leisureI watche drama series in her leisure time. Sherlock Holmes and Fleabag are my favorite! This year I has been hooked on real-time role-playing games and conducted a little study based on observations and experiences. Besides these I spent most of my time in ballroom dancing, which I started learning two years ago. This is me in a standard dancing.
